calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Sheila Salomon, Esq. appeared for plaintiff O'Connor and Associates.
Bradley Kaplan, Esq., a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Colindo Trust or Colindo, Ltd.
Defaults were enterd against defendants on March 4, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 15, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff O'Connor and Associates, and against the Defaulted Defendants Colindo Trust and Colindo, Ltd. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $92,940.07.
Prejudgment Interest - $15,328.74.
Attorney's Fees - $12,754.50.
Costs - $560.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $121,583.31.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
